message:
feat(mol): add --no-digest flag to skip digest bead creation (gt-t2bjt)

Patrol molecules (deacon, witness, refinery) run every cycle and their
digest beads pollute the database with thousands of low-value entries.
The --no-digest flag skips digest creation while still performing the
squash (close children, detach molecule).

Updated all three patrol prime outputs to include --no-digest in
their squash command templates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -260,7 +260,7 @@ func outputDeaconPatrolContext(ctx RoleContext) {
 			"Execute the step (heartbeat, mail, health checks, etc.)",
 			"Close step: `bd close <step-id>`",
 			"Check next: `bd mol current`",
-			"At cycle end (loop-or-exit step):
   - If context LOW:
     * Squash: `" + cli.Name() + " mol squash --jitter 10s --summary "<summary>"`
     * Create new patrol: `" + cli.Name() + " patrol new`
     * Continue executing from inbox-check step
   - If context HIGH:
     * Send handoff: `" + cli.Name() + " handoff -s "Deacon patrol" -m "<observations>"`
     * Exit cleanly (daemon respawns fresh session)",
+			"At cycle end (loop-or-exit step):
   - If context LOW:
     * Squash: `" + cli.Name() + " mol squash --no-digest --jitter 10s --summary "<summary>"`
     * Create new patrol: `" + cli.Name() + " patrol new`
     * Continue executing from inbox-check step
   - If context HIGH:
     * Send handoff: `" + cli.Name() + " handoff -s "Deacon patrol" -m "<observations>"`
     * Exit cleanly (daemon respawns fresh session)",
 		},
 	}
 	outputPatrolContext(cfg)

   - If context LOW:
     * Squash: `" + cli.Name() + " mol squash --jitter 10s --summary "<summary>"`
     * Create new patrol: `" + cli.Name() + " patrol new`
     * Continue executing from inbox-check step
   - If context HIGH:
     * Send handoff: `" + cli.Name() + " handoff -s "Refinery patrol" -m "<observations>"`
